verdict: TinyFish Fetch and Playwright browser extraction captured the complete menu content; Firecrawl markdown missed most pre-banquet menu items and desserts for this page.
policyUpdate: For restaurant menu pages, do not accept section headings without item bodies as complete extraction.
If Firecrawl output has empty menu sections, retry with TinyFish Fetch or browser innerText before building.
Menu page must render the complete official menu unless explicitly scoped as highlights only.
